identity.notes: 現行PAL Robotics製品ページとTALOS公式datasheetを確認。研究・産業用途のTALOSを別PAL製品や旧世代値と混在させていない。

positioningFacts.statement: TALOS is positioned as an advanced humanoid robot designed to boost research
PAL describes TALOS as a walking biped for tasks in environments such as the Factory of the Future
TALOS is fully torque-controllable, configurable and developed in ROS

mobility.evidenceSummary: 公式製品ページがwalking bipedと明記。

heightCm.condition: official product page and datasheet agree

weightKg.condition: official product page and datasheet agree

speedMps.rawValue: No numeric normal or maximum locomotion speed found on reviewed TALOS product page, datasheet or official research articles
speedMps.condition: walking/stair capability is not converted to speed
speedMps.evidenceSummary: 速度の公式数値は確認できない。

dof.rawValue: 32 Degrees of Freedom; legs 6×2, arms 7×2, grippers 1×2, waist 2, neck 2
dof.evidenceSummary: 全身32 DoFと脚・腕・グリッパー・腰・首の内訳。

payloadKg.rawValue: 6kg per arm is an arm-scoped rating and is retained in loadRatings
payloadKg.condition: scalar payloadKg is not populated from arm payload
payloadKg.evidenceSummary: 腕荷重をscalar payloadへ流用していない。

runtimeMin.condition: normalizedValue is walking autonomy; standby value remains raw
runtimeMin.evidenceSummary: 歩行稼働と待機時間を分離。

batteryCapacityWh.evidenceSummary: 公式datasheetの公称エネルギー1080Wh。

chargeTimeMin.rawValue: No TALOS charge-time value found on reviewed official product, datasheet and research pages
chargeTimeMin.condition: battery autonomy is not charge time
chargeTimeMin.evidenceSummary: 充電時間は確認できない。

batterySystem.rawValue: Lithium-Ion battery; nominal energy 1080Wh; maximum discharge +100A
batterySystem.evidenceSummary: リチウムイオン電池方式と1080Whを確認。

controlMethod.rawValue: Joint-level torque control; real-time ros_control loop; optional whole-body control, navigation, HRI skills and teleoperation
controlMethod.normalizedValue: joint-level torque control / ros_control / teleoperation options
controlMethod.evidenceSummary: トルク制御、ros_control、研究向けteleoperationを確認。

sdk.rawValue: ROS, OROCOS, ros_control, MoveIt!, URDF and Gazebo simulation model; ROS interfaces

computePlatform.rawValue: Intel Core i7 ×2 control and multimedia PCs (COM Express Type-6)
computePlatform.evidenceSummary: 制御・マルチメディア用i7×2。

ipRating.rawValue: No TALOS IP ingress-protection rating found on reviewed official pages or datasheet
ipRating.condition: robust/compliant wording is not an IP rating
ipRating.evidenceSummary: 防塵防水等級は確認できない。

operatingTemperature.rawValue: No whole-robot operating-temperature range found on reviewed TALOS official pages, datasheet or project pages
operatingTemperature.condition: sensor temperature access is not an operating range
operatingTemperature.evidenceSummary: 機体動作温度は確認できない。

safetyStandard.rawValue: Emergency-button/service-port and compliant interaction wording found, but no named TALOS safety standard or certification number
safetyStandard.condition: functional safety features are not a named standard
safetyStandard.evidenceSummary: 安全規格名・認証番号は確認できない。

loadRatings.condition: 6kg with each arm fully extended; official page does not label it rated or maximum

officialUseCases.officialExpression: advanced humanoid robot designed to boost your research
officialUseCases.reason: 公式製品位置付けが研究プラットフォームであるため。

officialUseCases.officialExpression: Factory of the Future / aircraft manufacturing industry / industrial complex tasks
officialUseCases.reason: 公式記事がAirbus航空機製造の実験ラインでの作業を明示するため。

usageExamples.title: TALOS research: torque-controlled locomotion for humanoids in unknown environments
usageExamples.summary: PAL RoboticsとTOWARD/DynamogradeがTALOSで未知環境の自律移動・15cm階段昇降を研究し、LAAS-CNRSとの接触計画を組み合わせた。

usageExamples.title: MEMMO: Giving memories to robots for a better motion generation
usageExamples.summary: EU MEMMOプロジェクトで、Airbus実験施設の航空機製造作業向けにTALOSを用いた動作生成・環境反応を検証した。

marketAvailability.rawValue: PAL presents TALOS as a configurable research/industrial platform with Request a quote; current production stock and standard shipment terms are not published
marketAvailability.evidenceSummary: 公式購入相談はあるが、現行在庫・標準納期は非公開。

japanAvailability.rawValue: No Japan sales, shipping or local availability statement found on reviewed PAL Robotics TALOS pages, contact and company pages
japanAvailability.evidenceSummary: 日本での入手性は確認できない。

distributorJapan.rawValue: No domestic authorized distributor identified on reviewed PAL Robotics official pages
distributorJapan.evidenceSummary: 国内正規代理店は確認できない。

supportNote.rawValue: Official contact, software documentation and research partnership route are public; Japan support, repair SLA and field-service terms are not published
supportNote.evidenceSummary: 技術・問い合わせ導線はあるが国内サポート条件は非公開。

sourceCandidates.reason: 公式Request a quoteを確認したが公開価格はない。
公式TALOS datasheetでDoF、荷重、電池、計算基盤を確認した。

conflicts: TALOSの荷重表現は腕scopeのみで、scalar payloadKgへ移していない。
TALOSの稼働時間はwalking 1.5hとstand-by 3hで条件が異なる。
humanReviewRequired: TALOSの日本向け販売・保守窓口と最新見積条件を公式窓口で確認する。

identity.variant: KANGAROO modular biped humanoid research platform; 4/5/7 DoF arm and end-effector configurations
identity.notes: 現行KANGAROO製品ページと公式datasheet、公式研究記事を確認。構成依存値を単一variantへ統合していない。

positioningFacts.statement: KANGAROO is positioned as a development-ready humanoid for dynamic locomotion, reinforcement learning and embodied AI research
PAL describes KANGAROO as a modular biped platform with configurable arm and end-effector options
PAL timeline states KANGAROO became ready for sale with two versions, KANGAROO and KANGAROO PRO

mobility.evidenceSummary: 公式製品ページがdynamic bipedalと明記。

weightKg.condition: official range; exact arm/end-effector configuration not selected
weightKg.evidenceSummary: 構成依存の公式重量範囲を単一値にしていない。

dof.rawValue: Total DoF 14–40 platform configuration; single arm 4, 5 or 7 DoF; torso 2 DoF; single leg 6 DoF

payloadKg.rawValue: Arm and bi-manual payload values are retained in loadRatings with configuration scope
payloadKg.condition: scalar payloadKg is not populated from arm or dual-arm ratings
payloadKg.evidenceSummary: 構成別荷重をscalarへ流用していない。

runtimeMin.condition: official autonomy statement; task/load condition not stated

batteryCapacityWh.rawValue: Official page/datasheet state Battery 976 Ah / 15 Ah wording; no voltage-based Wh value and unit consistency requires confirmation
batteryCapacityWh.condition: official battery unit/value appears ambiguous; no conversion made
batteryCapacityWh.evidenceSummary: 公式PDFの976Ah表記とページの電池表記を確認したがWh換算不可。

chargeTimeMin.rawValue: No KANGAROO charge-time value found on reviewed official product, datasheet and research pages
chargeTimeMin.evidenceSummary: 充電時間は確認できない。

batterySystem.rawValue: Battery is listed with a 976 Ah / 15 Ah value, but chemistry, voltage and configuration-specific interpretation are not clear
batterySystem.condition: official unit/value inconsistency; no chemistry or swap method inferred
batterySystem.evidenceSummary: 電池表記の単位・値に要確認点がある。

controlMethod.rawValue: ros2_control with current, speed, position, impedance and optional force/torque actuator modes; VR teleoperation kit and joystick controller options
controlMethod.normalizedValue: ros2_control / configurable actuator modes / VR teleoperation
controlMethod.evidenceSummary: ros2_control、各アクチュエータ制御、VR/joystickを確認。

sdk.rawValue: Ubuntu LTS + ROS 2 LTS + PAL OS; ROS 2 API C++/Python; ros2_control; URDF/MJCF; MuJoCo and mjlab; WebGUI/Rviz2
sdk.normalizedValue: ROS 2 / ros2_control / PAL OS / C++ and Python API
sdk.evidenceSummary: 公式のROS2、API、シミュレーション・開発ツール。

computePlatform.rawValue: Control PC Intel i7 32GB RAM 1TB SSD; multimedia PC Intel i7 32GB RAM 1TB SSD; optional NVIDIA Jetson GPU
computePlatform.normalizedValue: 2× Intel i7 PCs; optional NVIDIA Jetson GPU
computePlatform.evidenceSummary: 制御・マルチメディアPCとJetson GPU option。

ipRating.rawValue: No KANGAROO IP ingress-protection rating found on reviewed official pages or datasheet
ipRating.condition: robust wording is not an IP rating
ipRating.evidenceSummary: 防塵防水等級は確認できない。

operatingTemperature.rawValue: No whole-robot operating-temperature range found on reviewed KANGAROO official pages, datasheet and research articles
operatingTemperature.condition: component environmental limits are not published
operatingTemperature.evidenceSummary: 動作温度は確認できない。

safetyStandard.rawValue: SIL 2 based on IEC 61508; PL d based on EN ISO 13849-1; onboard and wireless emergency buttons
safetyStandard.normalizedValue: IEC 61508 SIL 2 / EN ISO 13849-1 PL d
safetyStandard.evidenceSummary: 安全規格・レベルを公式PDFで確認。

loadRatings.condition: 4 DoF arm, arm fully extended; official table does not label rated/maximum
4 DoF arms, bi-manual manipulation; official table does not label rated/maximum
5 DoF arm, arm fully extended; official table does not label rated/maximum
5 DoF arms, bi-manual manipulation; official table does not label rated/maximum
7 DoF arm, arm fully extended; official table does not label rated/maximum
7 DoF arms, bi-manual manipulation; official table does not label rated/maximum

officialUseCases.reason: 公式製品ページが動的ロコモーション研究向け開発プラットフォームと明示。

officialUseCases.officialExpression: reinforcement learning and embodied AI; MuJoCo/mjlab and RL tools
officialUseCases.reason: 公式製品ページがRL、embodied AI、シミュレーションツールを明示。

officialUseCases.officialExpression: customize KANGAROO to foster breakthroughs in robot learning and robotic movement
officialUseCases.reason: 研究用カスタマイズ・ロボット学習開発を既存prototype開発へ接続。

usageExamples.title: Kangaroo: The dynamic robot & the latest developments
usageExamples.summary: KANGAROOでトルク制御によるジャンプ、Whole Body Inverse Dynamics Controller、閉リンク機構の制御と実機実験を研究した。

marketAvailability.rawValue: PAL timeline says KANGAROO and KANGAROO PRO became ready for sale; current product page uses Request a quote and does not publish stock or shipment terms
marketAvailability.evidenceSummary: 公式timelineのready for saleは確認したが、現在の在庫・納期は非公開。

japanAvailability.rawValue: No Japan sales, shipping or local availability statement found on reviewed PAL Robotics KANGAROO pages, contact and company pages
japanAvailability.evidenceSummary: 日本での入手性は確認できない。

distributorJapan.rawValue: No domestic authorized distributor identified on reviewed PAL Robotics official pages
distributorJapan.evidenceSummary: 国内正規代理店は確認できない。

supportNote.rawValue: Official datasheet lists remote diagnostics/support, onsite installation and training, hardware maintenance/replacement, warranty extension and software upgrades
supportNote.evidenceSummary: 公式PDFにサポートサービス項目。日本固有条件は非公開。

sourceCandidates.reason: 公式Request a quote導線を確認したが公開価格はない。
公式PDFで構成別DoF、速度、荷重、電池、安全規格を確認した。

conflicts: KANGAROOの身長・重量・DoF・荷重はplatform configuration依存で、単一値に統合していない。
公式電池表記は976 Ah / 15 Ahと読み取れるが、電圧・Wh・variant対応がなく容量と方式をneeds-reviewにした。
humanReviewRequired: KANGAROOの代表arm configuration（4/5/7 DoF）を公開Robotレコードで決定する。
公式電池datasheetの976 Ah / 15 Ah表記と単位をPAL Roboticsへ確認する。
日本向け販売・保守窓口と最新見積条件を公式窓口で確認する。
